EPISODE_NARRATIVE: A strong upper-level trough in combination with a tropical wave produced heavy showers and strong thunderstorms across most of the USVI.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Law enforcement reported North Shore Road Closed near the Ferry Dock Station due to flooding.

EPISODE_NARRATIVE: A strong upper-level trough in combination with a tropical wave produced heavy showers and strong thunderstorms across most of the USVI.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Tennis court and starfish area flooded. Phone lines down along Route 10 near Centerline Road.

EPISODE_NARRATIVE: A moist southerly flow as a result of Hurricane Jose meandering well north of the local area resulted in shower and thunderstorm activity across the region.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Saint Croix police department reported serious flooding occurring from Mid Island all the way to the west with up to three feet of water on roadways near the Home Depot store.
